description: pet-data-api의 pet_facilities 데이터를 Petory locationservice 테이블에 중복 제거 후 동기화

steps.name: PetDataApiClient 확장: GET /facilities 페이지네이션 + PetFacilityDto
steps.summary: PetFacilityDto/PetFacilityPageDto 신규, PetDataApiClient에 facilityClient(30s) + fetchFacilitiesPage/fetchAllFacilities 추가

steps.name: FacilitySyncService: 변환 매핑 + 중복 체크 + 배치 저장
steps.summary: FacilitySyncService 신규: fetchAllFacilities → isValid/toEntity/existsByNameAndAddress 중복체크 → batchWriter 배치 저장

steps.name: Controller + Scheduler: POST /api/admin/location/sync + @Scheduled 자정 배치
steps.summary: LocationServiceAdminController(POST /api/admin/location/sync, ADMIN/MASTER) + FacilitySyncScheduler(매일 새벽 1시) 신규 추가
